differential_diagnoses: Kaposi's varicelliform eruption (superimposed on inflammatory dermatosis)
Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS syndrome)
next_steps: Repeat skin biopsy with immunohistochemistry (CD3, CD4, CD8, CD7, CD30, Ki-67) to rule out cutaneous T-cell lymphoma
Perform flow cytometry on peripheral blood to assess for Sézary cells
Obtain T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies on skin and blood specimens
Perform fine-needle aspiration or excisional biopsy of the axillary lymph node for histological and immunophenotypic analysis
Follow-up biopsy of the pulmonary nodules to rule out metastatic malignancy or lymphoma
Continue targeted antimicrobial therapy for the identified skin superinfection (Pseudomonas aeruginosa)
